# Huiman Ark

<p align="center">
  <img src="./public/favicon.svg" alt="Huiman Ark Logo" width="120" />
</p>

<p align="center">
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/React-18.x-blue" alt="React" />
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/Next.js-16.x-black" alt="Next.js" />
  <img src="https://img.shields.io/badge/TypeScript-5.x-blue" alt="TypeScript" />

<p align="center">
  <a href="./README.zh-CN.md">中文</a> | <a href="./README.en.md">English</a>
</p>

Huiman Ark (绘漫方舟) is an open source AI comic generation tool that turns text stories into storyboard scripts and comic panels with LLMs and AI image generation.

## Documentation

- 中文文档: [README.zh-CN.md](./README.zh-CN.md)
- English docs: [README.en.md](./README.en.md)

## Quick Links

- 在线演示 / Demo: [https://huiman.antmoo.com](https://huiman.antmoo.com)
- 本地开发: `npm install` -> `npm run dev`
- 关键配置: `src/config/app.ts`

## Notes

- 根 `README.md` 作为国际化入口页，便于 GitHub 默认展示。
- 详细使用说明请进入对应语言版本文档。
